chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1519 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 05-09-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for Respondents Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Rasool Bux Director Agriculture Sukkur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition due to lapse of time has become infructuous and he does not press the same, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
